title: Filter view

posts.author: rony123 (Rony)
posts.cookedHtml: I have noticed there is only possibility for one type of each view in a board, so if I create a Filter view, I can not create another filter view which is different than the one I created earlier. I tried duplicate the filter view and it worked, but there was no option to change the configuration of the filter so having it the same as earlier is not helping.
